findings: Old semantic exclusion of completion/current relevance is not supported and was withdrawn from current authority.
Old six-hit corpus aggregate has no row-level inventory and now carries zero evidence weight.
Only one of six prior speaker sentences exactly instantiates overt V + 咗 + object.
Runtime action_verb scope and selectional compatibility coverage are broader/weaker than the old documentation implied.
Speaker A and Speaker B must complete the same new controlled packet independently.
Frozen runtime instantiates the narrow subtype for only 2 of 6 controlled positive surfaces.
Quantified and associative nominal objects are not integrated into the subtype; two other positives expose lexical/Jyutping and question-wrapper gaps.
